message.content:
In the directory C:\Users\User\citedby-ai, run the following sed replacements across all .tsx files in the pages/ directory ONLY (not services, not config, not lib, not types.ts). 

These are CSS class replacements for glassmorphism:

1. `bg-[var(--bg-surface)]` → `bg-white/[0.03]`
2. `border-[var(--border-default)]` → `border-white/[0.06]`
3. `bg-[var(--bg-elevated)]` → `bg-white/[0.06]`
4. `bg-[#18181B]` → `bg-white/[0.03]`
5. `bg-[#27272A]` → `bg-white/[0.06]`
6. `border-[#27272A]` → `border-white/[0.06]`
7. `bg-zinc-900/50` → `bg-white/[0.03]`
8. `bg-zinc-900` → `bg-white/[0.03]` (be careful not to replace bg-zinc-900/50 twice, do /50 first)
9. `border-zinc-800` → `border-white/[0.06]`
10. `bg-zinc-800` → `bg-white/[0.06]` (careful: only standalone bg-zinc-800, not hover:bg-zinc-800)
11. `hover:bg-zinc-800` → `hover:bg-white/[0.06]`
12. `hover:bg-[var(--bg-elevated)]` → `hover:bg-white/[0.06]`

Run these sed commands on all pages/*.tsx files using sed -i. Use the correct syntax for Windows Git Bash. Run them in the right order (specific patterns first, then general).

After all replacements, count the remaining occurrences of `bg-[var(--bg-surface)]` and `border-[var(--border-default)]` in pages/*.tsx to verify they're all replaced.

content.text: I'll run these sed replacements in the correct order (specific patterns first, then general) on all pages/*.tsx files.

Good, 36 .tsx files to process. Now I'll run the sed replacements in the correct order. The key ordering concerns are:
- `bg-zinc-900/50` before `bg-zinc-900`
- `hover:bg-zinc-800` before `bg-zinc-800`
- `hover:bg-[var(--bg-elevated)]` before `bg-[var(--bg-elevated)]`

input.command:
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && \
sed -i 's/bg-\[var(--bg-surface)\]/bg-white\/[0.03]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/border-\[var(--border-default)\]/border-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/hover:bg-\[var(--bg-elevated)\]/hover:bg-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/bg-\[var(--bg-elevated)\]/bg-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/bg-\[#18181B\]/bg-white\/[0.03]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/bg-\[#27272A\]/bg-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/border-\[#27272A\]/border-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/bg-zinc-900\/50/bg-white\/[0.03]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/hover:bg-zinc-800/hover:bg-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/border-zinc-800/border-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/bg-zinc-900/bg-white\/[0.03]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
sed -i 's/bg-zinc-800/bg-white\/[0.06]/g' pages/*.tsx && \
echo "All sed replacements completed successfully."
input.description: Run all 12 sed replacements in correct order on pages/*.tsx files

content.text: All replacements ran without errors. Now let me verify that the CSS variable patterns are fully replaced, and check counts for all patterns.

input.command:
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-[var(--bg-surface)] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'bg-\[var(--bg-surface)\]' pages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':0$' || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining border-[var(--border-default)] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'border-\[var(--border-default)\]' pages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':0$' || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-[var(--bg-elevated)] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'bg-\[var(--bg-elevated)\]' pages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':0$' || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-[#18181B] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'bg-\[#18181B\]' pages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':0$' || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-[#27272A] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'bg-\[#27272A\]' pages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':0$' || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining border-[#27272A] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'border-\[#27272A\]' pages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':0$' || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-zinc-900 (standalone, not /50) ===" && \
grep -rP --include="*.tsx" 'bg-zinc-900(?!/)' pages/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-zinc-900/50 ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" 'bg-zinc-900/50' pages/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining border-zinc-800 ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" 'border-zinc-800' pages/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining bg-zinc-800 (not hover:) ===" && \
grep -rP --include="*.tsx" '(?<!hover:)bg-zinc-800' pages/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NONE found" && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Remaining hover:bg-zinc-800 ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" 'hover:bg-zinc-800' pages/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NONE found"
input.description: Verify all patterns have been replaced in pages/*.tsx

content.text: Let me also confirm the new glassmorphism classes are present in the files to verify the replacements actually took effect.

input.command:
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && \
echo "=== Occurrences of bg-white/[0.03] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'bg-white/\[0\.03\]' pages/ | grep -v ':0$' | awk -F: '{sum+=$2} END {print "Total:", sum, "across", NR, "files"}' && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Occurrences of bg-white/[0.06] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'bg-white/\[0\.06\]' pages/ | grep -v ':0$' | awk -F: '{sum+=$2} END {print "Total:", sum, "across", NR, "files"}' && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Occurrences of border-white/[0.06] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'border-white/\[0\.06\]' pages/ | grep -v ':0$' | awk -F: '{sum+=$2} END {print "Total:", sum, "across", NR, "files"}' && \
echo "" && \
echo "=== Occurrences of hover:bg-white/[0.06] ===" && \
grep -r --include="*.tsx" -c 'hover:bg-white/\[0\.06\]' pages/ | grep -v ':0$' | awk -F: '{sum+=$2} END {print "Total:", sum, "across", NR, "files"}'
input.description: Count new glassmorphism class occurrences to confirm replacements took effect
